rationale: No events directly affecting Portugal this cycle; Iran deal uncertainty continues to have indirect energy price relevance for Portuguese households.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: Continued uncertainty over Iran deal keeps EU energy prices volatile, with indirect impact on Portuguese electricity and gas bills.

top_events.title: Gold price trending down
top_events.summary: Falling gold prices reflect shifting global financial conditions; minor indirect signal for Portuguese savers and pension funds.

top_events.title: EU migration debate: rival marches in Rome
top_events.summary: EU migration policy shifts could affect Portugal as a destination country; ongoing debate with no concrete new rules yet.
